MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Walter J. Scott of the law offices of Scott Law Group LLP (214-755-1978) appears by telephone as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF LEDESMA VENTURES, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT Walter Scott Jr. as COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling that is effective upon filing of prooof of service, that includes all future dates and that contains plaintiff's contact information.
